title: cheilanthes ambigua
intro: Cheilanthes ambigua, also known as the Variable Rasp fern or the Rasp fern, is a species of fern in the family Woodsiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cheilanthes ambigua include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from pain and fever. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
